description: Each meeting season/round key occurs once.
Each session season/round/type key occurs once.
Each result session/driver key occurs once.
Each driver lap key occurs once.
Each driver stint key occurs once.
Each result has driver and constructor identities.
Session-grained facts must reference an existing normalized session.
Required event/session domain coverage meets its minimum row count.
The normalized bundle and database load plan contain identical table counts.
Provider and historical coverage gaps are reported separately from defects.
